title: WEST BENGAL ASSEMBLY DISSOLVED | VIJAY TVK FORMS GOVERNMENT | NASHIK TCS CASE UPDATE - 8 MAY, 2026
description:
India’s biggest breaking news today in just 3 minutes. In this video, we cover the latest updates from West Bengal politics, Tamil Nadu government formation, Thalapathy Vijay’s TVK majority support, Nashik TCS case, Hantavirus cases in India, CBSE Class 12 Result 2026, Instagram followers drop, Indus Waters Treaty dispute, and the Delhi Police ISI-linked terror module investigation.

West Bengal Governor R. N. Ravi has dissolved the state assembly, while BJP prepares for government formation after the elections. In Tamil Nadu, Thalapathy Vijay’s TVK may soon cross the majority mark with support from Congress, VCK and Left parties. In Maharashtra, key accused Nida Khan has been arrested in the Nashik TCS case. Meanwhile, ICMR has said that the Hantavirus cases involving Indians appear isolated and there is no immediate health threat to India. CBSE Class 12 students are still waiting for the 2026 result date, while reports suggest the result may come in the third week of May. Social media is also discussing the “Great Purge of 2026” after celebrities like Virat Kohli, Priyanka Chopra and Cristiano Ronaldo reportedly lost Instagram followers. Pakistan has raised the Indus Waters Treaty issue at the United Nations, and Delhi Police has uncovered an alleged ISI-linked terror plan targeting important locations in India.

Watch the full video for today’s top India news, political updates, current affairs, breaking news, and major national developments explained in simple language. Recent reports confirm key developments around West Bengal government formation, TVK’s majority numbers, the Nashik TCS case arrest, ICMR’s hantavirus update, CBSE result uncertainty, the Indus Waters Treaty dispute, and the ISI-linked terror module investigation.
